subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath acknowledged that which the Tongue of God, the Self-Subsisting, the All-Compelling, hath uttered. Verily, We have borne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن اعترف بما نطق لسان الله المهیمن القیوم انا حملنا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @suffering and imprisonment
